stage1_reason: Direct replacement of generic_handle_irq(irq_find_mapping()) with generic_handle_domain_irq() as part of kernel-wide API consolidation
stage2_reason: Driver commit converts generic_handle_irq(irq_find_mapping()) to generic_handle_domain_irq(), which is exactly the API introduced by kernel commit 8240ef50d486. The driver migration (v5.14→v5.15) follows the kernel API addition (v5.13→v5.14), showing direct adoption of the new helper.
